def negative_server_side_template_injection_via_user_input_in_template_source():
    rule_id = "server_side_template_injection_via_user_input_in_template_source"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "User-supplied data used as the template source string for Jinja2 or Mako, enabling SSTI."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
